parameters.query:
UPDATE invoice_log
SET status = 'completed',
    kiotviet_po_id = {{$json.kiotviet_po_id || 'NULL'}},
    kiotviet_po_code = {{$json.kiotviet_po_code ? "'" + String($json.kiotviet_po_code).replace(/'/g, "''") + "'" : 'NULL'}},
    processing_time_ms = {{$json.processing_time_ms}}
WHERE zalo_user_id = '{{$json.zalo_user_id}}'
  AND zalo_msg_id = '{{$json.zalo_msg_id}}';
